ANY ADDITIONAL DETAILS AS TO WHEN, WHO, HOW AND FOR HOW LONG MAY BE, AND PROBABLY HAVE ALREADY BEEN, OBTAINED IN DISCOVERY. DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS RAYMOND YEE AND DONNA YU'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain and states sufficient facts to support asserted causes of action. Any additional details as to when, who, how and for how long may be, and probably have already been, obtained in discovery.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Proposed order to be dropped in Dept. 501's inbox.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Stephanie Guerra In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS RAYMOND YEE AND DONNA YU'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

DENIED. Sufficient facts stated to support conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/CFH)
